_comment: Terrain-art tour: a wide static frame holds the whole battlefield -- the mottled procedural grass, the forest canopy on the west flank, the shaded hill on the east -- while a lone player Cavalry regiment (drill mode, no opponent) is ordered on a short eastward march across the open ground between them. The march is there to give the still ground a moving reference: the block's team colour and crisp formation read clearly against all three textures. The leg is kept short (250 wu at a walk) so the arrival lands well inside the clip. Driven live through the real SelectionManager by tools/demo/DemoInputRecorder.gd; world coordinates; physics ticks (60/s).
